utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required by the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore, all 7/7 items are present and sufficiently specified according to the requested format.
